top_findings.title: Production source code missing from archive — src/main does not exist
top_findings.evidence: Only src/test/ exists (5 files, 691 LOC); no src/main/java directory. Tests import com.braziliansoccer.mcp.data.DataLoader, com.braziliansoccer.mcp.tools.MatchTools, com.braziliansoccer.mcp.model.Match, etc. but these classes are absent from the archive. retort.db test_coverage=1.0 confirms code existed at scoring time.
top_findings.suggestion: Re-archive from the original workspace to include src/main; prior evaluation cited 9 source files / 1560 LOC that are now gone

top_findings.title: MCP server entrypoint not verifiable — source missing from archive
top_findings.evidence: pom.xml:108 declares mainClass=com.braziliansoccer.mcp.BrazilianSoccerMcpServer; MCP SDK dependency at pom.xml:28 (io.modelcontextprotocol.sdk:mcp:0.10.0). Server class not present in archive. test_coverage=1.0 suggests it compiled.
top_findings.suggestion: Re-archive to include src/main; pom.xml and test structure suggest MCP server was implemented

top_findings.title: Data loading from data/kaggle/ not verifiable — DataLoader class missing
top_findings.evidence: DataLoaderTest.java:4 imports com.braziliansoccer.mcp.data.DataLoader; tests load 6 CSVs (loadBrasileiraoMatches, loadCopaDoBrasilMatches, loadLibertadoresMatches, loadExtendedMatches, loadHistoricalMatches, loadPlayers). test_coverage=1.0 but source absent.
top_findings.suggestion: Re-archive to verify DataLoader implementation reads CSV files from data/kaggle/

top_findings.title: Match query by team not verifiable — MatchTools class missing
top_findings.evidence: MatchToolsTest.java:56 calls matchTools.searchMatches("Palmeiras", 2022, null, null, null, null); test passes (test_coverage=1.0) but MatchTools.java absent from archive.

top_findings.title: Date range and season filter not verifiable — source missing
top_findings.evidence: MatchToolsTest.java:102 calls searchMatches(null, null, null, "2019-01-01", "2019-12-31", 50); season filter tested at line 56 with season=2022. test_coverage=1.0 but implementation absent.
top_findings.suggestion: Re-archive to verify date range and season filtering in MatchTools
